chapter_title: Toll Underpass or Tunnel in Certain Counties
text: The term of a franchise granted under this chapter may not exceed 50 years.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 282. Toll Underpass or Tunnel in Certain Counties
##### § 282.003 — Term of Franchise

The term of a franchise granted under this chapter may not exceed 50 years.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The term of a franchise granted under this chapter may not exceed 50 years.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
